violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, and hallway leading to kitchen is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
The floors in the kitchen area are in poor repair (lacking sealed cement). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2026

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen and hallway leading to kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the milk chest gaskets have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025
The floors in the kitchen area is in poor repair (lacking sealed cement). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. PIC informed to wash dishes via dishwasher and to use sink bay to sanitize dishes. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

Utensils (forks and spoons) in the kitchen area are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the dish washing area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves under the steam tables have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
Inspector observed the following in poor repair: -hand washing sink (leak near foot peddles), -dish sink faucet (leak observed in several areas). New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
The floors in the kitchen area is in poor repair (lacking sealed cement). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

Cheese, lettuce and salads were observed held at 49-54 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

At time of inspection, ambient of reach-in refrigerator was 49 degrees Fahrenheit. TCS foods voluntarily disposed of, all other foods moved to milk cooler. Establishment to not store TCS foods in unit until it reaches 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

Inspector observed plumbing supply pipe to hand sink faucet to be dripping and leaking at the time of use causing pooling of water below the sink. Plumbing system is to be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

Inspector observed plumbing supply pipe to hand sink faucet to be dripping and leaking at the time of use causing pooling of water below the sink. Plumbing system is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2023

The floors in the kitchen are worn and peeling which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
The dishwasher in the back kitchen area is in poor repair(observed a leak). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2023
